note: Deployed to the Pharos Atlantic Testnet (chain id 688689). TreasuryPolicy + GuardLog broadcast via script/Deploy.s.sol with the agent wired and native limits seeded. The legacy Pharos Testnet (688688, testnet.dplabs-internal.com) is no longer reachable; Atlantic is the current developer testnet.

verification.note: Source verification attempted via forge verify-contract (blockscout, chain 688689) but the Pharosscan host (atlantic.pharosscan.xyz) sits behind a Vercel Security Checkpoint bot-challenge: the /api endpoint returns an HTML challenge page instead of a JSON API response, so forge fails with 'expected value at line 1 column 1'. The contracts are deployed and live on-chain; only public source verification is blocked. Retry if/when Pharosscan exposes a non-challenged Blockscout API endpoint.
